description: Privilege escalation in Keycloak FGAP V2: manage-clients permission allows broader admin operations when Admin Permissions are enabled at realm level

escalation_details.escalation_target: broader admin permissions via FGAP V2 realm permission model
escalation_details.root_cause: Insufficient scope boundary enforcement in RealmPermissionsV2 when Admin Permissions feature is enabled
escalation_details.prerequisite: Admin Permissions must be enabled at the realm level

remediation: Add explicit scope boundary checks in RealmPermissionsV2.java
Ensure manage-clients permission cannot grant access to non-client admin operations
Add regression tests for permission boundary enforcement
